steps.title: Nowhere to Go
steps.text: Pieces deep in enemy territory are vulnerable. If you can cut off every escape square, you win the piece for free. Queens, knights, and bishops are particularly easy to trap on the edge.

steps.title: Rim Knights
steps.text: A knight on the rim is dim — and often doomed. Push pawns toward it, block its squares with your pieces, and the knight has nowhere to run. "Knight on the rim, future is dim" — Tarrasch.
